sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ عِيدُ الفِطْرِ المُبَارَكُ مُنَاسَبَةً دِينِيَّةً وَاجْتِمَاعِيَّةً جَلِيلَةً تَغْمُرُ العَالَمَ العَرَبِيَّ بِأَجْوَاءٍ مِنَ الفَرَحِ وَالتَّسَامُحِ.
sentences.translation: Ramazanski bajram je veličanstvena vjerska i društvena prilika koja preplavljuje arapski svijet atmosferom radosti i tolerancije.
sentences.translationEn: Eid al-Fitr is a grand religious and social occasion that floods the Arab world with an atmosphere of joy and tolerance.

sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ الِاسْتِعْدَادَاتُ لِلْعِيدِ قَبْلَ أَيَّامٍ، حَيْثُ تَنْشَغِلُ الأُمَّهَاتُ بِتَحْضِيرِ الحَلْوِيَّاتِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ مِثْلِ «المَعْمُولِ» المَحْشُوِّ بِالتَّمْرِ.
sentences.translation: Pripreme za Bajram počinju danima ranije, kada su majke zauzete pripremanjem tradicionalnih slatkiša poput 'maamoula' punjenog urmama.
sentences.translationEn: Preparations for Eid begin days in advance, as mothers busy themselves with preparing traditional sweets like 'Maamoul' stuffed with dates.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي صَبَاحِ العِيدِ، يَتَوَجَّهُ المَصَلُّونَ إِلَى المَسَاجِدِ مُرْتَدِينَ مَلَابِسَهُمُ الجَدِيدَةَ، ثُمَّ يَتَبَادَلُونَ التَّهَانِيَ بِعِبَارَاتٍ مِلْؤُهَا المَوَدَّةُ.
sentences.translation: Na bajramsko jutro, vjernici odlaze u džamije noseći novu odjeću, a zatim razmjenjuju čestitke s izrazima punim naklonosti.
sentences.translationEn: On the morning of Eid, worshippers head to mosques wearing their new clothes, then exchange greetings with expressions full of affection.

sentences.arabic: تَلْعَبُ «العِيدِيَّةُ» دَوْرًا كَبِيرًا فِي إِدْخَالِ البَهْجَةِ عَلَى قُلُوبِ الأَطْفَالِ، وَهِيَ مَبْلَغٌ نَقْدِيٌّ يُقَدِّمُهُ الكِبَارُ لِلصِّغَارِ.
sentences.translation: 'Bajramluk' igra veliku ulogu u donošenju radosti u srca djece, a to je novčani iznos koji stariji daju mlađima.
sentences.translationEn: The 'Eidiya' plays a major role in bringing joy to children's hearts; it is a cash gift given by elders to the young.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذِهِ الِاحْتِفَالَاتِ تُجَسِّدُ رُوحَ التَّضَامُنِ وَتُجَدِّدُ العُهُودَ بَيْنَ الأَقَارِبِ وَالأَصْدِقَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ove proslave utjelovljuju duh solidarnosti i obnavljaju veze između rođaka i prijatelja.
sentences.translationEn: These celebrations embody the spirit of solidarity and renew the bonds between relatives and friends.
